title: ononis reclinata var. calycina
intro: Ononis reclinata var. calycina, also known as the twisted restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as edema and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Ononis reclinata var. calycina include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers, leaves, and stems in hot water to create a tea, which is often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
benefits: Ononis reclinata var. calycina has many benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, which can lead to a significant decrease in symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), ulcers, and other gastrointestinal issues. Its antimicrobial properties also make it effective in treating infections, wounds, and skin conditions like acne and eczema, promoting faster healing and reduced scarring. Additionally, Ononis reclinata var. calycina has been shown to have antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage, reduce the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disease, and improve overall well-being. By incorporating this plant into one's lifestyle, individuals can experience improved mental clarity, increased energy levels, and a more balanced and healthy life.
actions: Ononis reclinata var. calycina has many therapeutic actions, such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce swelling and pain in joints, improving mobility and quality of life for individuals with arthritis. Its antioxidant properties can protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, potentially reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. By incorporating Ononis reclinata var. calycina into traditional medicine, individuals can experience improved overall health and well-being, enabling them to engage in daily activities with greater ease and confidence.
constituents: Ononis reclinata var. calycina has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (kaempferol, quercetin), alkaloids (ononin, ononidine), glycosides (ononidin, ononin-7-glucoside), and phenolic acids (ferulic acid, sinapic acid), which contribute to its medicinal properties. These compounds have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, helping to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer, and even combat bacterial and fungal infections. The flavonoids and alkaloids in Ononis reclinata var. calycina have been shown to have vasodilatory effects, improving blood flow and lowering blood pressure, which can reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as Raynaud's disease. By incorporating Ononis reclinata var. calycina into their daily lives, people may experience improved overall health and well-being, reduced inflammation, and a lower risk of chronic diseases.
